fields.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` lets you construct a path step by step by adding lines, curves,
arcs, and sub-shapes, then calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> to obtain the resulting <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath>.

`Detach` transfers ownership of the built path to the caller and resets the builder.
`Snapshot` creates an immutable copy without resetting the builder.

This type wraps a native Skia resource and implements `IDisposable`. Always dispose of
it when done, either with a `using` statement or by calling `Dispose()` directly.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();
using var path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class as a copy of the specified path.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of an oval to the path.

params.startAngle: The starting angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise from <paramref name="startAngle" />.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a complete circle to the path.

params.y: The y-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the center of the circle.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a complete oval to the path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of another path to this path.

params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.other: The path containing the elements to add.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of another path to this path after applying the specified matrix.

params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.matrix: The matrix to apply to the other path's points before appending.
params.other: The path containing the elements to add.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of another path to this path after translating by the specified offset.

params.dx: The amount to translate in the x direction.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.other: The path containing the elements to add.
params.dy: The amount to translate in the y direction.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon to the path.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon with a line back to the first point; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.points: The array of points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon to the path.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon with a line back to the first point; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.points: The span of points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle to the path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle to the path, starting at the specified corner index.

params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start the rectangle (0–3).
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle to the path.

params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle to the path, starting at the specified corner index.

params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start the rounded rectangle (0–3).
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle with the specified corner radii to the path.

params.ry: The y-radius of the rounded corners.
params.rx: The x-radius of the rounded corners.
params.rect: The bounds of the rounded rectangle.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc that is tangent to the two lines defined by the control points.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to the path.

params.startAngle: The starting angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to begin the arc with a move-to; otherwise, <see langword="false" /> to continue from the current point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.
params.r: The x and y radii of the ellipse.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the larger of the two arcs.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc that is tangent to the two lines through the control points.

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the larger of the two arcs.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by connecting the last point to the first point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the path.

params.w: The weight of the conic, determining how closely it approximates a circle.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic (rational quadratic Bezier) curve to the path.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the path.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bezier curve to the path.

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the second control point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the elements added to the builder.
fields.summary: Returns the built path and resets the builder.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the resources used by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and native resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only native resources.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.summary: Releases the native resources used by the current instance.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type for the path.
fields.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the interior of the path is determined.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a straight line to the path from the current point to the specified point.

params.point: The end point of the line.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a straight line to the path from the current point to the specified coordinates.

params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified point.

params.point: The starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified coordinates.

params.y: The y-coordinate of the starting point.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the starting point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the path.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bezier curve to the path.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.
params.r: The x and y radii of the ellipse.
params.xy: The offset to the endpoint, relative to the current point.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the larger of the two arcs.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the larger of the two arcs.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation angle of the ellipse x-axis in degrees.
params.x: The x-offset to the endpoint, relative to the current point.
params.y: The y-offset to the endpoint, relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve to the path.

params.point1: The offset to the end point.
params.point0: The offset to the control point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve to the path.

params.dy1: The y-offset to the end point.
params.dx0: The x-offset to the control point.
params.dy0: The y-offset to the control point.
params.dx1: The x-offset to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the path.

params.point2: The offset to the end point.
params.point1: The offset to the second control point.
params.point0: The offset to the first control point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bezier curve to the path.

params.dy0: The y-offset to the first control point.
params.dy2: The y-offset to the end point.
params.dx2: The x-offset to the end point.
params.dx1: The x-offset to the second control point.
params.dx0: The x-offset to the first control point.
params.dy1: The y-offset to the second control point.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Resets the builder to an empty state, removing all previously added path elements.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of another path to this path in reverse order.

params.other: The path whose elements are appended in reverse.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a relative line to the path.

params.point: The offset to the end point, relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative line to the path.

params.dy: The y-offset to the end point.
params.dx: The x-offset to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified offset from the current point.

params.point: The offset to the starting point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified offset from the current point.

params.dy: The y-offset to the starting point.
params.dx: The x-offset to the starting point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bezier curve to the path.

params.point1: The offset to the end point.
params.point0: The offset to the control point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bezier curve to the path.

params.dy1: The y-offset to the end point.
params.dx0: The x-offset to the control point.
params.dy0: The y-offset to the control point.
params.dx1: The x-offset to the end point.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> snapshot of the current builder state.
fields.summary: Returns an immutable copy of the current path without resetting the builder.
